zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire於1330年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親William Finley Royal Forester40歲，母親Isabell Dempster28歲。他於1354年與Marjorie MacDonald在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1366年住在蘇格蘭Forfarshire梅姆爾。他去世於1379年7月9日在蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年49歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire于1330年出生在苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲William Finley Royal Forester40岁，母亲Isabell Dempster28岁。他于1354年与Marjorie MacDonald在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1366年住在苏格兰Forfarshire梅姆爾。他去世于1379年7月9日在苏格兰培爾培斯享年49岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Finley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic personal name Fionnlagh (Old Irish Findlaech), from fionn ‘white, fair’ (see Finn ) + laoch ‘hero’, reinforced by an Old Norse name based on finn ‘Finn’ + leikr ‘fight’ or ‘hero’. The name is common in Ireland as well as Scotland.

English: habitational name from one or more lost, unidentified or altered placenames so named, such as Philleyholme, Dorset (recorded as Finelegh in 1280) derived from Old English fīna ‘wood-pecker’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Also a variant of Findlow, from Finlow Hill in Over Alderley, Cheshire (from Old English fīn ‘heap’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’ meaning ‘heaped mound’).

variants.name: Finn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Aidan, Bridie, Brigid, Declan, Dierdra, Eoin, Keelin, Maeve, Niall, Seamus.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Finn ‘descendant of Fionn’, a byname meaning ‘white’ or ‘fair-haired’; it is often found Anglicized as White . This name is borne by several families in the west of Ireland.

English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Fin(n) (Old Norse Finnr, Fin, originally ‘Finn’), used both as a byname and as a short form of various compound names with this first element.

variants.name: Finlayson
meanings: Scottish: from the Gaelic personal name Fionnlagh (see Finley 1 and Finlay ) + -son. This is the Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic MacFhionnlaigh.

variants.name: Finlay
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Finley   1.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire was born in 1330, in Perthshire, Scotland, his father, William Finley Royal Forester, was 40 and his mother, Isabell Dempster, was 28. He married Marjorie MacDonald in 1354, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Menmuir, Forfarshire, Scotland in 1366. He died on 9 July 1379, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 49, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire est né en 1330, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, William Finley Royal Forester, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabell Dempster, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Marjorie MacDonald en 1354, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Menmuir, Forfarshire, Écosse en 1366. Il est décédé le 9 juillet 1379, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire 1330 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Finley Royal Forester 40 und seine Mutter Isabell Dempster 28. Er hat 1354 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Marjorie MacDonald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1366 hat er in Menmuir, Forfarshire, Scotland gelebt. Er starb am 9. Juli 1379 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire è nato il nel 1330 nel Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Finley Royal Forester, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isabell Dempster, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Marjorie MacDonald nel 1354, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Menmuir, Forfarshire, Scotland nel 1366. Morì il 9 luglio 1379, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshireが1330年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Finley Royal Foresterは40歳，母Isabell Dempsterは28歳であった。1354年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでMarjorie MacDonaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1366年にはスコットランドForfarshireメンムイルに住んでいた。彼は1379年7月9日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで49歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire(이)가 1330년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Finley Royal Forester(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Dempster(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1354년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Marjorie MacDonald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1366년도에 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 멘무이르에서 살았다. 그는 1379년 7월 9일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire nasceu em 1330, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Finley Royal Forester, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Dempster, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjorie MacDonald em 1354, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Menmuir, Forfarshire, Scotland em 1366. Ele faleceu em 9 de julho de 1379, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire родился в 1330 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Finley Royal Forester было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Dempster, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie MacDonald в 1354 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности менмуир, Forfarshire, Шотландия в 1366 году. Он умер 9 июля 1379 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire nació en 1330, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, William Finley Royal Forester, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabell Dempster, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Marjorie MacDonald en 1354, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Menmuir, Forfarshire, Scotland en 1366. Murió el 9 de julio de 1379, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
